title: Robin Is Pulled Toward the Gate
description: Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.
scene: Across pages 17, this part follows Luffy, Blueno, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But there's no way to get there!!

summary: Luffy pushes ahead toward Robin and CP9, leaving the larger Enies Lobby battle to the rest of the rescue force.
